calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ray Manemea, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Marine Engineering and Supply Company.
Default was entered against defendant Marine Engineering and Supply Company on December 1, 2016.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on December 1, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 4, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ray Manamea and against the Defaulted Defendant Marine Engineering and Supply Company, as follows:

Economic Damages - $92,500.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $1,000,000.00.
Total - $1,092,500.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
